title.ko: 화학적 또는 물리적 공정, 예. 촉매 작용 또는 콜로이드 화학; 이에 관련된 장치
title.en: CHEMICAL OR PHYSICAL PROCESSES, e.g. CATALYSIS OR COLLOID CHEMISTRY; THEIR RELEVANT APPARATUS

definition.ko: 화학적, 물리적 또는 물리화학적 방법 또는 장치 B01J3/00, B01J4/00, B01J6/00, B01J7/00, B01J8/00, B01J19/00 가스를 포함하는 화학적 방법 B01J8/00, B01J10/00, B01J12/00, B01J15/00 액체를 포함하는 화학적 방법 B01J8/00, B01J10/00, B01J14/00, B01J16/00 촉매 원소 또는 무기화합물을 포함하는 것 B01J21/00, B01J23/00, B01J27/00 라네이(RANEY)형 B01J25/00 분자체 B01J29/00 수소화합물, 배위착체 또는 유기화합물을 포함하는 것 B01J31/00 촉매 담체 일반 B01J32/00 제조 B01J33/00～ 37/00 촉매의 재생, 또는 재활성화 일반 B01J38/00 흡착 또는 여과조제 조성물 B01J20/00 이온 교환공정 B01J39/00～ 49/00 콜로이드 화학 B01J13/00 조립 B01J2/00

title.en: Processes or devices for granulating materials, in general; Rendering particulate materials free flowing in general, e.g. making them hydrophobic
by dividing the liquid material into drops, e.g. by spraying, and solidifying the drops
in stationary drums or troughs, provided with kneading or mixing appliances
by suspending the powder material in a gas, e.g. in fluidised beds or as a falling curtain
by expressing the material, e.g. through sieves and fragmenting the extruded length
by pressing in moulds or between rollers
Obtaining flakes by scraping a solid layer from a surface
using agents to prevent the granules sticking together; Rendering particulate materials free flowing in general, e.g. making them hydrophobic

title.ko: 물질에 화학적 또는 물리적 변화를 일으키게 하기 위해 저압 또는 초고압을 이용하는 공정; 그를 위한 장치 (압착가스, 액화가스 또는 고체화된 가스의 수용 또는 저장을 위한 압력용기 F17C)
title.en: Processes of utilising sub-atmospheric or super-atmospheric pressure to effect chemical or physical change of matter; Apparatus therefor (pressure vessels for containing or storing compressed, liquefied or solidified gases F17C)
Pressure vessels, or vacuum vessels, having closure members or seals specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 초고압을 사용하는 공정, 예. 다이아몬드의 생성을 위한 것; 그를 위한 장치, 예. 모울드, 다이스(dies) (B01J 3/04가 우선)
title.en: Processes using ultra-high pressure, e.g. for the formation of diamonds; Apparatus therefor, e.g. moulds or dies (B01J0003040000 takes precedence)
Application of shock waves for chemical reactions or for modifying the crystal structure of substances

title.ko: 공급장치; 공급 또는 배출 조정장치 (압력용기용 공급 또는 배출장치 B01J 3/02)
title.en: Feed devices; Feed or outlet control devices (feed or outlet devices for pressure vessels B01J0003020000)
for feeding measured quantities of reagents

title.ko: 가스 발생장치(불활성 가스 혼합물의 제조 B01J 19/14; 특정가스를 발생하기 위한 것은 관련 서브클래스를 참조, 예. C01B, C10J)
title.en: Apparatus for generating gases (production of inert gas mixtures B01J0019140000;for generating specific gases, see the relevant subclasses, e.g. C01B, C10J)

title.ko: 유체 및 고체입자의 존재하에서 행하는 화학적 또는 물리적 공정 일반; 그를 위한 장치
title.en: Chemical or physical processes in general, conducted in the presence of fluids and solid particles; Apparatus for such processes
with stationary particles, e.g. in fixed beds
the fluid passing successively through two or more beds
in tube reactors; the solid particles being arranged in tubes

title.ko: 이동입자가 있는 것(유동화 입자에 의한 것 B01J 8/18)
title.en: with moving particles (with fluidised particles B01J0008180000)
moved by stirrers or by rotary drums or rotary receptacles
moved by gravity in a downward flow
moving in free vortex flow apparatus

title.ko: 입자가 진동 또는 맥동을 받는 것(B01J 8/40이 우선)
title.en: with particles being subjected to vibrations or pulsations (B01J0008400000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유동화입자가 있는 것

title.en: with liquid as a fluidising medium
gas being introduced into the liquid

title.ko: 유동층 기술에 의하는 것 (B01J 8/20이 우선)

title.en: with two or more fluidised beds, e.g. reactor and regeneration installations
the edge of a lower bed projecting beyond the edge of the superjacent bed
with introduction into the fluidised bed of more than one kind of moving particles
with stationary packing material in the fluidised bed, e.g. bricks, wire rings, baffles
with fluidised bed through which there is an essentially horizontal flow of particles
with fluidised bed containing a rotatable device or being subject to rotation
with fluidised bed subjected to vibrations or pulsations
with fluidised bed subjected to electric current or to radiations
for treatment of endless filamentary, band or sheet material

title.ko: 고체입자가 존재하지 않는 상태에서 액체를 가스상 매질과 반응시키는 화학적 프로세스 일반, 또는 그것에 특히 적합한 장치(B01J 19/08이 우선; 분리, 예. 증류, 화학반응과 결합한 분리 B01D)
title.en: Chemical processes in general for reacting liquid with gaseous media other than in the presence of solid particles; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (B01J0019080000 takes precedence; separation, e.g. distillation, also combined with chemical reactions B01D)

title.ko: 가스상 매질과 가스상 매질을 반응시키는 화학적 프로세스 일반; 그것에 특히 적합한 장치(B01J 3/08, B01J 8/00, B01J 19/08이 우선)
title.en: Chemical processes in general for reacting gaseous media with gaseous media; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (B01J0003080000, B01J0008000000, B01J0019080000 take precedence)
for obtaining at least one reaction product which, at normal temperature, is in the solid state
Colloid chemistry, e.g. the production of colloidal materials or their solutions, not otherwise provided for; Making microcapsules or microballoons
by physical processes, e.g. drying, spraying
Simple coacervation, i.e. addition of highly hydrophilic material
Complex coacervation, i.e. interaction of oppositely charged particles
removing solvent from the wall-forming material solution
In situ polymerisation with all reactants being present in the same phase
After-treatment of capsule walls, e.g. hardening

title.ko: 액체와 액체를 반응시키는 화학적 프로세스 일반; 그것에 특히 적합한 장치(B01J 8/00, B01J 19/08이 우선)
title.en: Chemical processes in general for reacting liquids with liquids; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (B01J0008000000, B01J0019080000 take precedence)

title.ko: 가스상 매질과 비입상 고체, 예. 시이트상 물, 를 반응시키기 위한 화학적 프로세스 일반; 그것에 특히 적합한 장치(B01J 19/08이 우선)
title.en: Chemical processes in general for reacting gaseous media with non-particulate solids, e.g. sheet material; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (B01J0019080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 액체와 비입상 고체, 예. 시이트상 물, 와를 반응시키기 위한 화학적 프로세스 일반; 그것에 특히 적합한 장치(B01J 19/08이 우선)
title.en: Chemical processes in general for reacting liquids with non-particulate solids, e.g. sheet material; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (B01J0019080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 화학적, 물리적 또는 물리화학적 프로세스 일반; 그것들에 관련한 장치
title.en: Chemical, physical or physico-chemical processes in general; Their relevant apparatus
Apparatus characterised by being constructed of material selected for its chemically-resistant properties

title.ko: 액체의 고화(마이크로 캡슐의 제조 B01J 13/02)
전기 또는 파동에너지를 직접 적용하는 또는 입자선 방사를 사용하는 프로세스; 그를 위한 장치(충격파 적용 B01J 3/08;
title.en: Processes employing the direct application of electric or wave energy, or particle radiation; Apparatus therefor (application of shock waves B01J0003080000)
Production of inert gas mixtures; Use of inert gases in general
Preventing evaporation or oxidation of non-metallic liquids by applying a floating layer, e.g. of microballoons

title.ko: 내부에 가동요소가 있는 고정식 반응장치(B01J 19/08, B01J 19/26이 우선)
title.en: Stationary reactors having moving elements inside (B01J0019080000, B01J0019260000 take precedence)
in the form of helices, e.g. screw reactors
in the form of endless belts

title.ko: 내부에 가동요소가 없는 고정식 반응장치(B01J 19/08, B01J 19/26이 우선; 정지한 입자를 갖는 것 B01J 8/02)
title.en: Stationary reactors without moving elements inside (B01J0019080000, B01J0019260000 take precedence;with stationary particles B01J0008020000)
Nozzle-type reactors, i.e. the distribution of the initial reactants within the reactor is effected by their introduction or injection through nozzles

title.ko: 이동식 반응장치, 예. 회전드럼 (B01J 19/08이 우선)
title.en: Moving reactors, e.g. rotary drums  (B01J0019080000 takes precedence)
Loose or shaped packing elements, e.g. Raschig rings or Berl saddles, for pouring into the apparatus for mass or heat transfer
Packing elements in the form of grids or built-up elements for forming a unit or module inside the apparatus for mass or heat transfer

title.ko: 고체흡착조성물 또는 여과조제조성물； 크로마토그래피용 흡착제； 그러한 조제, 재생 또는 재활성화를 위한 프로세스
title.en: Solid sorbent compositions; Filter aid compositions; Sorbents for chromatography; Catalysts

title.ko: 고체흡착조성물 또는 여과조제조성물； 크로마토그래피용 흡착제； 그러한 조제, 재생 또는 재활성화를 위한 프로세스
title.en: Solid sorbent compositions or filter aid compositions; Sorbents for chromatography; Processes for preparing, regenerating or reactivating thereof

title.ko: 무기물로 이루어지는 것

title.en: comprising compounds of alkali metals, alkaline earth metals or magnesium

title.ko: B01J 20/04로 분류되지 않는 금속의 산화물 또는 수산화물로서 이루어지는 것
title.en: comprising oxides or hydroxides of metals not provided for in group B01J0020040000
comprising aluminium oxide or hydroxide; comprising bauxite

title.ko: 실리카 또는 규산염으로 이루어지는 것

title.en: Naturally occurring clays or bleaching earth

title.ko: 알루미노-실리케이트(B01J 20/12가 우선)

title.en: comprising free carbon; comprising carbon obtained by carbonising processes
Naturally occurring macromolecular compounds, e.g. humic acids or their derivatives
characterised by their form or physical properties

title.ko: 사전 처리, 분석 또는 조사를 위한 크로마토그래피에 특별히 적합한 흡착제
title.en: Sorbents specially adapted for preparative, analytical or investigative chromatography

title.ko: 다공성 흡착제(이온 교환 B01J 39/00~B01J 41/00)

title.en: Phases chemically bonded to a substrate, e.g. to silica or to polymers
Processes for preparing, regenerating or reactivating
Catalysts comprising the elements, oxides or hydroxides of magnesium, boron, aluminium, carbon, silicon, titanium, zirconium or hafnium
Boron or aluminium; Oxides or hydroxides thereof
Silicon, titanium, zirconium or hafnium; Oxides or hydroxides thereof

title.ko: 그룹 B01J 21/00에 분류될 수 없는 금속 또는 금속산화물 또는 금속수산화물로 된 촉매(B01J 21/16이 우선)
title.en: Catalysts comprising metals or metal oxides or hydroxides, not provided for in group B01J0021000000 (B01J0021160000 takes precedence)
of the alkali- or alkaline earth metals or beryllium
of arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium

title.ko: 귀금속에 관한 것
그룹 B01J 23/02 ～ B01J 23/36에 분류된 금속, 산화물 또는 수산화물과 결합한 것
title.en: combined with metals, oxides or hydroxides provided for in groups B01J0023020000-B01J0023360000
with alkali- or alkaline earth metals or beryllium
with gallium, indium, thallium, germanium, tin or lead
with arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium
with arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium

title.ko: 철족금속 또는 구리에 관한 것
title.en: of the iron group metals or copper

title.ko: 그룹 B01J 23/02 ～ B01J 23/36에 분류된 금속, 산화물 또는 수산화물과 결합한 것
title.en: combined with metals, oxides or hydroxides provided for in groups B01J0023020000-B01J0023360000
with alkali- or alkaline earth metals or beryllium

title.ko: 비소, 안티몬, 비스무스, 바나듐, 니오븀, 탄탈륨, 폴로늄, 크롬, 몰리브덴, 텅스텐, 망간, 테크네튬 또는 레늄과 결합한 것
title.en: with arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium

title.ko: 크롬, 몰리브덴 또는 텅스텐
몰리브덴
그룹 B01J 23/02～ B01J 23/36에 분류된 그 밖의 금속, 산화물 또는 수산화물을 추가로 포함한 것
title.en: containing in addition other metals, oxides or hydroxides provided for in groups B01J0023020000-B01J0023360000

title.ko: 재생 또는 재활성화
그룹 B01J 23/02 ～ B01J 23/36에 분류되는 금속, 산화물 또는 수산화물로 된 촉매에 관한 것
title.en: of catalysts comprising metals, oxides or hydroxides provided for in groups B01J0023020000-B01J0023360000
of catalysts comprising metals, oxides or hydroxides of the iron group metals or copper
of catalysts comprising metals, oxides or hydroxides of the noble metals

of catalysts comprising compounds of halogens

title.ko: 분자체(molecular sieves)로 된 촉매

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는 다음 용어가 표시된 의미로 사용된다. ㆍ "제올라이트"는 다음을 의미한다: (Ⅰ) 기저 교환 및 분자 체 성질을 가진 결정질 알루미노실리케이트로, 사면체 산화물 단위로 구성된 3차원 [3D] 미세 다공성 격자 구조를 갖는 물질; (Ⅱ) 전자의 범주와 동형인 화합물로, 격자 구조 내의 알루미늄 또는 실리콘 원자가 다른 원소, 예. 갈륨, 게르마늄, 인 또는 보론, 로 부분적으로 또는 완전히 대체된 화합물.

title.ko: 염기교환 특성을 가진것, 예. 결정성 제올라이트, 지지된 점토
title.en: having base-exchange properties, e.g. crystalline zeolites, pillared clays

title.ko: 결정성 알루미노실리케이트 제올라이트; 이와 동형(isomorphous)의 화합물
title.en: Crystalline aluminosilicate zeolites; Isomorphous compounds thereof
containing iron group metals, noble metals or copper
containing arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium

of the pentasil type, e.g. types ZSM-5, ZSM-8 or ZSM-11
containing iron group metals, noble metals or copper

containing iron group metals, noble metals or copper

containing iron group metals, noble metals or copper
containing arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium

title.ko: 그룹 B01J 29/08 ～ B01J 29/65에 해당되지 않는 특정구조로 규정된 형
title.en: of types characterised by their specific structure not provided for in groups B01J0029080000-B01J0029650000
containing iron group metals, noble metals or copper
containing arsenic, antimony, bismuth, vanadium, niobium, tantalum, polonium, chromium, molybdenum, tungsten, manganese, technetium or rhenium
Aluminophosphates containing other elements, e.g. metals, boron
Silicates, aluminosilicates or borosilicates of titanium, zirconium or hafnium

title.ko: 수소화물, 배위 착화합물 또는 유기화합물로 된 촉매(중합반응에만 사용되는 촉매조성물 C08)
title.en: Catalysts comprising hydrides, coordination complexes or organic compounds (catalyst compositions used only in polymerisation reactions C08)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에 있어서 물의 존재는 분류를 위하여 무시된다.

title.en: containing organic compounds or metal hydrides
containing carboxylic acids or their salts
containing organo-metallic compounds or metal hydrides
containing nitrogen, phosphorus, arsenic or antimony

title.ko: 부가적으로, 그룹 B01J 31/02 ～ B01J 31/24까지에 분류될 수 없는 무기금속화합물을 더 함유하는 것
title.en: containing in addition, inorganic metal compounds not provided for in groups B01J0031020000-B01J0031240000
of the platinum group metals, iron group metals or copper
Protection of catalysts, e.g. by coating

title.ko: 일반적으로 촉매의 형태나 물리적 특성을 특징으로 하는 촉매
title.en: Catalysts, in general, characterised by their form or physical properties
in a liquid or molten state

title.ko: 치수가 특징인 경우, 예. 입자 크기(콜로이드 상태에서 B01J35/23; 결정체 크기 B01J35/77)
title.en: characterised by dimensions, e.g. grain size (in a colloidal state B01J0035230000;crystallite size B01J0035770000)
characterised by their shape or configuration
Foraminous structures having flow-through passages or channels, e.g. grids or three-dimensional [3D] monoliths
characterised by their surface properties or porosity

title.ko: 결정적 특성에 특징, 예. 반결정성(탄소로 구성된 촉매 B01J21/18; 분자 체 B01J29/00)

having a two-dimensional [2D] layered crystalline structure, e.g. layered double hydroxide [LDH]
Compounds characterised by their crystallite size

title.ko: 촉매제조를 위한 프로세스 일반; 촉매활성화를 위한 프로세스 일반
title.en: Processes, in general, for preparing catalysts; Processes, in general, for activation of catalysts

title.ko: 함침, 코팅(피복, coating) 또는 침전(코팅에 의한 보호 B01J 33/00)
title.en: Impregnation, coating or precipitation (protecting by coating B01J0033000000)
using a distinct intermediate layer, e.g. substrate-support-active layer
in the presence of water, e.g. steam
Irradiation by, or application of, electric, magnetic or wave energy, e.g. ultrasonic waves
Regeneration or reactivation of catalysts, in general
Gas or vapour treating; Treating by using liquids vaporisable upon contacting spent catalyst
with control of oxygen content in oxidation gas
Oxidation gas comprising essentially steam and oxygen
Moving bed, e.g. vertically or horizontally moving bulk
having mainly transverse, i.e. lateral, flow of oxygen-containing gas and material
having mainly counter-current flow of oxygen-containing gas and material
having mainly concurrent flow of oxygen-containing gas and material
in gaseous suspension, e.g. fluidised bed
Indirectly heating or cooling material within regeneration zone or prior to entry into regeneration zone
with plural distinct serial combustion stages
and with substantially complete oxidation of carbon monoxide to carbon dioxide within regeneration zone
and adding heat by solid heat carrier
and adding simultaneously or subsequently free oxygen; using oxyhalogen compound
Liquid treating or treating in liquid phase, e.g. dissolved or suspended
including substantial dissolution or chemical precipitation of a catalyst component in the ultimate reconstitution of the catalyst
Wet oxidation of material submerged in liquid

title.ko: 양이온 교환; 양이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 양이온 교환 특성을 개선하기 위한 물질의 처리 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 B01D15/36)
양이온 교환; 양이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 양이온 교환 특성을 개선하기 위한 물질의 처리 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 B01D15/36)
title.en: Cation exchange; Use of material as cation exchangers; Treatment of material for improving the cation exchange properties (ion-exchange chromatography processes B01D0015360000)

title.ko: 양이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 양이온 교환성질을 개량하기 위한 물질의 처리
title.en: Use of material as cation exchangers; Treatment of material for improving the cation exchange properties

title.ko: 유기물

title.en: containing also inorganic materials, e.g. inert material coated with an ion-exchange resin

title.ko: 고분자 화합물 (B01J 39/17이 우선)

title.en: obtained otherwise than by reactions only involving unsaturated carbon-to-carbon bonds
obtained by reactions only involving unsaturated carbon-to-carbon bonds

title.ko: 음이온 교환; 음이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 음이온 교환 특성을 개선하기 위한 물질의 처리 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 B01D15/36)
title.en: Anion exchange; Use of material as anion exchangers; Treatment of material for improving the anion exchange properties (ion-exchange chromatography processes B01D0015360000)
Use of material as anion exchangers; Treatment of material for improving the anion exchange properties
obtained otherwise than by reactions only involving unsaturated carbon-to-carbon bonds
obtained by reactions only involving unsaturated carbon-to-carbon bonds

title.ko: 양쪽성 이온 교환, 즉. 양이온기와 음이온기를 갖는 이온 교환체의 사용; 양쪽성 이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 양쪽성 이온 교환 특성을 개선하기 위한 물질의 처리 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 B01D15/36)
title.en: Amphoteric ion-exchange, i.e. using ion-exchangers having cationic and anionic groups; Use of material as amphoteric ion-exchangers; Treatment of material for improving their amphoteric ion-exchange properties (ion-exchange chromatography processes B01D0015360000)

title.ko: 착체 또는 킬레이트가 형성되는 이온 교환; 착체 또는 킬레이트 형성 이온 교환체로서의 물질의 사용; 착체 또는 킬레이트 형성 이온 교환 특성을 개선하기 위한 물질의 처리 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 B01D15/36)
title.en: Ion-exchange in which a complex or a chelate is formed; Use of material as complex or chelate forming ion-exchangers; Treatment of material for improving the complex or chelate forming ion-exchange properties (ion-exchange chromatography processes B01D0015360000)

title.ko: 이온 교환 공정 일반; 그것을 위한 장치 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 또는 장치 B01D15/08)
title.en: Ion-exchange processes in general; Apparatus therefor (ion-exchange chromatography processes or apparatus B01D0015080000)
in which the adsorbent properties of the ion-exchanger are involved, e.g. recovery of proteins or other high-molecular compounds
Granulation; Incorporation of ion-exchangers in a matrix; Mixing with inert materials

title.ko: 컬럼(column) 또는 베드(bed) 공정

title.en: characterised by the construction of the column or container
where the ion-exchangers are in a removable cartridge
using columns or beds of different ion exchange materials in series
with alternately arranged cationic and anionic exchangers

title.ko: 이온교환물질이 물리적 처리, 예. 열, 전류, 조사, 진동을 받는 것 (전기투석, 또는 전기삼투 B01D 61/42)
title.en: during which the ion-exchange material is subjected to a physical treatment, e.g. heat, electric current, irradiation or vibration (electrodialysis or electro-osmosis B01D0061420000)
subjected to a direct electric current
with moving ion-exchange material; with ion-exchange material in suspension or in fluidised-bed form

title.ko: 이온교환물질을 시이트, 리본 또는 필라멘트, 예. 멤브레인 형태로 사용하는 것에 특징이 있는 것 (전기투석, 전기삼투 B01D 61/42)
title.en: characterised by the use of ion-exchange material in the form of ribbons, filaments, fibres or sheets, e.g. membranes (electrodialysis or electro-osmosis B01D0061420000)
in the form of filaments or fibres
for obtaining a solution having a fixed pH

title.ko: 이온 교환체의 재생 또는 재활성화; 그것을 위한 장치 (이온 교환 크로마토그래피 공정 또는 장치 B01D15/08)
title.en: Regeneration or reactivation of ion-exchangers; Apparatus therefor (ion-exchange chromatography processes or apparatus B01D0015080000)
containing cationic and anionic exchangers in separate beds
containing cationic and anionic exchangers in separate beds
for large scale industrial processes or applications
having devices which prevent back-flow of the ion-exchange mass during regeneration
